title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Navin's - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Navin's - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!
